steps.description: Write iw-research-quick/SKILL.md in skills/ (single file, ≤300 lines)
Review skill quality + sync to .claude/skills/ via iw sync-skills

steps.command: python3 -c "import yaml; f=open('skills/iw-research-quick/SKILL.md'); content=f.read(); lines=content.split('---',2); fm=yaml.safe_load(lines[1]); assert fm['name']=='iw-research-quick'; body_lines=len(lines[2].splitlines()); assert body_lines<=300, f'SKILL.md body is {body_lines} lines (max 300)'; print(f'PASS: {body_lines} lines, name={fm[\"name\"]}')"
steps.description: QV: Validate SKILL.md frontmatter and line count (≤300)

steps.command: iw sync-skills && iw sync-skills --project innoforge && ls .claude/skills/iw-research-quick/SKILL.md && echo 'PASS: skill synced to all projects'
steps.description: QV: Sync skill to all registered projects (iw-ai-core + innoforge) and verify
